2606.16733.title: A First-Principles Derivation of LLM Policy Optimization: From Expected Reward to GRPO and Its Structural Extensions
2606.16733.paper_summary: Policy gradient algorithms for language models optimize the same objective $J(θ) = \mathbb{E}*{τ\sim p*θ(τ)}[R(τ)]$, which has exactly two factors: the trajectory probability $p_θ(τ)$ and the reward $R(τ)$. Every method from REINFORCE to PPO to GRPO and their descendants modifies one or both factors to address a specific failure in the preceding formulation. Existing surveys organize these methods by domain or chronology, which obscures the rationale behind each design choice and the precise location of its intervention within the gradient estimator. This survey revisits the landscape of LLM policy optimization from $J(θ)$ on first principles and uses the trajectory side, induced by $p_θ(τ)$, and the reward side, induced by $R(τ)$, as the two axes along which methods are located. It covers the path from REINFORCE and PPO to GRPO, as well as post-GRPO variants, Agentic RL, and GRPO-OPD. The resulting framework is unified, diagnostic, and extensible: it analyzes methods from a shared objective, identifies which side each method modifies and why, and applies the same trajectory and reward axes across these settings. Across these settings, the framework also exposes compound failures that no single-side fix resolves and that therefore require joint design of the trajectory side and the reward side. The boundary cases and coupled failures identified by this map mark where existing solutions run out and provide a principled starting point for designing the next generation of LLM policy optimization algorithms.
2606.16733.paper_summary_zh: 政策梯度算法對於語言模型優化相同的目標 $J(θ) = \mathbb{E}*{τ\sim p*θ(τ)}[R(τ)]$，該目標恰好有兩個因素：軌跡概率 $p_θ(τ)$ 和獎勵 $R(τ)$。從 REINFORCE 到 PPO 再到 GRPO 及其後裔的每種方法都修改了一個或兩個因素，以解決前述公式中的特定失敗。現有的調查將這些方法按領域或時間順序進行組織，這模糊了每個設計選擇背後的理由以及其在梯度估計中的干預精確位置。本調查從 $J(θ)$ 的第一原則重新檢視 LLM 政策優化的全景，並使用由 $p_θ(τ)$ 產生的軌跡側和由 $R(τ)$ 產生的獎勵側作為定位方法的兩個軸。它涵蓋了從 REINFORCE 和 PPO 到 GRPO 的過程，以及 GRPO 之後的變體、Agentic RL 和 GRPO-OPD。所產生的框架是統一的、診斷性的和可擴展的：它從共享目標分析方法，確定每種方法修改了哪一側及其原因，並在這些設置中應用相同的軌跡和獎勵軸。在這些設置中，該框架還揭示了單側修復無法解決的複合失敗，因此需要共同設計軌跡側和獎勵側。這張地圖所識別的邊界情況和耦合失敗標示了現有解決方案的盡頭，並為設計下一代 LLM 政策優化算法提供了一個原則性的起點。
2606.16733.author: Jianghan Shen et.al.
2606.16733.authors: Jianghan Shen, Siqi Luo, Yue Li, Jiyao Liu, Wanying Qu, Yi Zhang, Ziyan Huang, Tianbin Li, Ming Hu, Xiaohong Liu, Yirong Chen, Junjun He
